name: abc-bank-pm-os
description: A product-management operating system for bank PMs working in Claude Code. It packages /discover and /prd skills for Opportunity Solution Tree discovery and PRFAQ-format PRDs; four reviewer agents (engineer-reviewer with project memory, exec-reviewer, customer-advocate, and compliance-reviewer) for parallel artifact review before sprint planning; and a PreToolUse hook that blocks saving final PRD files without a ## Compliance section. Built for retail banking product teams shipping regulated mobile features who want repeatable PM workflows, stakeholder-aware specs, and compliance guardrails embedded in the toolchain—not ad hoc prompts.
